title: Great FPS
description: Great FPS is a lightweight Fabric optimization modpack designed to dramatically improve Minecraft performance, reduce lag, and boost FPS on low-end PCs while preserving the vanilla gameplay experience.
body:
# 🚀 Great FPS — Maximum Minecraft Performance

Great FPS is a lightweight Fabric optimization modpack focused entirely on improving Minecraft performance without changing vanilla gameplay.

Designed for low-end PCs, laptops, and integrated graphics, this pack combines the best modern Fabric optimization mods to deliver smoother gameplay, faster loading times, reduced lag, and significantly higher FPS.

## ⚡ What This Modpack Improves

* Higher and more stable FPS
* Faster chunk loading
* Reduced stuttering and lag spikes
* Lower RAM and CPU usage
* Faster startup times
* Improved rendering performance
* Better shader compatibility
* Smoother overall gameplay

## 🧩 Included Optimization Mods

This pack includes carefully selected optimization mods such as:

* Sodium
* Lithium
* Starlight
* FerriteCore
* ModernFix
* ImmediatelyFast
* EntityCulling
* More Culling
* Krypton
* Iris Shaders

All mods are tested together for stability and compatibility.

## 💻 Recommended For

* Low-end computers
* Laptops
* Intel integrated graphics
* Players who want vanilla-friendly optimization
* Players looking for lightweight shader support

## 🎯 Modpack Goal

The goal of Great FPS is simple:
provide the smoothest and fastest Minecraft experience possible while keeping the game lightweight, stable, and true to vanilla Minecraft.
